# TODONT API

A simple todo management REST API built with FastAPI.

## Endpoints

### GET /todos
Returns all todos.

Response: array of Todo objects.

### POST /todos
Creates a new todo.

Request body: `{ "title": string, "done": boolean (default: false) }`
Response: the created Todo object with its assigned id.
Status: 201

## Models

### Todo
- `id` (integer) — unique identifier, auto-assigned
- `title` (string) — the todo description
- `done` (boolean) — completion status, defaults to false

## Docs

Interactive API docs are available at `/docs` (Swagger UI) and `/redoc` (ReDoc).
